TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tademaw-Shu_Qi_(Taiwan), title = tademaw-Shu_Qi_(Taiwan), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tademaw-Shu_Qi_(Taiwan)} }

S.FORM: === u siwkay niza === Shu Qi (1976.4.16) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan. u tatengaay a ngangan sa ci Lin Lihuy. namaala ku yadahay a kawlah i iga atu tilibi. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Lin Li-hui (Chinese:śěóÁęčśÖß; pinyin: L√≠n L√¨hu√¨; born 16 April 1976), better known by her stage name Shu Qi, is a Taiwanese actress and model. She is among the highest paid actresses in China u kawlah niza u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: === u siwkaj niza === sńßu *i (****.*.**) tatajna, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan. u tat…ôŇčaaj a ŇčaŇčan sa ¶i r~…ĺin r~…ĺińßuj. namaar~…ĺa ku jadańßaj a kawr~…ĺańß i iga atu tir~…ĺibi. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam r~…ĺin r~…ĺi-ńßui ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô:***; pinjin: r~…ĺ*n r~…ĺ*ńßu*; born ** aprir~…ĺ ****), b…ôtt…ôr known bj ńß…ôr stag…ô nam…ô sńßu *i, is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tr…ôss and mod…ôr~…ĺ. sńß…ô is amoŇč tńß…ô ńßigńß…ôst paid a ¶tr…ôss…ôs in ¶ńßina u kawr~…ĺańß niza u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: === u siwkay niza === Shu Qi (1976.4.16) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan. u tatengaay a ngangan sa ci Lin Lihuy. namaala ku yadahay a kawlah i iga atu tilibi. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Lin Li-hui (Chinese:śěóÁęčśÖß; pinyin: L√≠n L√¨hu√¨; born 16 April 1976), better known by her stage name Shu Qi, is a Taiwanese actress and model. She is among the highest paid actresses in China u kawlah niza u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
